symbols.summary: Build a reusable, jittable integrator for a parametric Integrand.

symbols.summary: Return a TimeOp that computes dx/dt, broadcasting dt over arbitrary leading dims.

subpackages.doc: SFI diagnostics — residual-consistency checks for inference results.

symbols.name: DiagnosticsReport
symbols.summary: Container for residual-consistency test results.

symbols.name: DynamicsOrderReport
symbols.signature: (verdict: 'str', fit: 'dict' = <factory>, scaling: 'dict' = <factory>, scan: 'dict' = <factory>, cross_check: 'Optional[dict]' = None, meta: 'dict' = <factory>) -> None
symbols.summary: Result of :func:`classify_dynamics`.

symbols.name: assess
symbols.summary: Run residual-consistency checks on a fitted inference object.

symbols.name: classify_dynamics
symbols.summary: Classify trajectory data as overdamped, underdamped, or inconclusive.

symbols.name: parametric_four_point_diagnostic
symbols.summary: Four-point diagnostic: test that Cov[r_i, r_{i+2}] = 0.

symbols.name: plot_dynamics_order
symbols.summary: Visualise an OD-vs-UD classification (:func:`classify_dynamics`).

symbols.name: plot_qq
symbols.summary: Normal Q--Q plot of pooled whitened residuals.

symbols.name: plot_residual_acf
symbols.summary: Autocorrelation of the residuals (and of $z^2$).

symbols.name: plot_residual_histogram
symbols.summary: Histogram of pooled residuals overlaid with N(0,1) density.

symbols.name: plot_summary
symbols.summary: 1×3 summary figure: Q--Q plot, residual histogram, and ACF.

symbols.name: as_default_float

symbols.summary: Return JAX's currently-active default float dtype.

symbols.name: fd_velocity
